AiRecommendationItemDto.title: AiRecommendationItemDto
AiRecommendationItemDto.description:
Pass-through DTO, match 1:1 với backend `/backend/ai/recommendations`.

- Chấp nhận cả "service_id" và "id" ở input (backend hiện trả "id",
  mock fallback trả "service_id").
- Output luôn dùng tên field Python (service_id, imageUrl, vendorName, staffAvatars)
  để khớp spec frontend.
- `extra="allow"` để backend thêm field mới không cần update DTO.

appointmentId.description: ID of the completed appointment to review

facilityId.description: ID of the clinic or facility being reviewed

comment.example: Clean facility and easy to find.

photoKeys.description: S3 keys of uploaded photos (max 5). Upload via POST /v1/s3/presign first.

comment.example: Clean facility and easy to find.
